---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

::: {.section-page}

# Mathematics

This section includes expository mathematical writing, concepts, and links to longer technical work.

<div class="project-list">

<div class="project-item">
<a class="project-link" href="mathematics/mathematical-bridges.qmd" aria-label="4.1 Mathematical Bridges: Complex Functions, Algebra, and Geometry">
<div class="project-number">4.1</div>
<div class="project-text">
<div class="project-title">Mathematical Bridges: Complex Functions, Algebra, and Geometry</div>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">complex analysis</span>
<span class="project-tag">Riemann sphere</span>
<span class="project-tag">rational maps</span>
<span class="project-tag">Möbius transformations</span>
<span class="project-tag">expository writing</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-divider"></div>

<div class="project-item">
<a class="project-link" href="mathematics/eigenvectors-and-water-waves.qmd">
<div class="project-number">4.2</div>
<div class="project-text">
<div class="project-title">Eigenvectors and Water Waves</div>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">linear algebra</span>
<span class="project-tag">eigenvalues</span>
<span class="project-tag">separation of variables</span>
<span class="project-tag">water waves</span>
<span class="project-tag">PDE intuition</span>
<span class="project-tag">expository writing</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-divider"></div>

</div>

:::
